title: (Bullish Signal) PTGX, Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend on March 09, 2021.
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
Over the last three days, Tickeron's A.I.dvisor has detected that PTGX's AroonUp green line (see chart) is above 70, while the AroonDown red line is below 30. When the green line goes above 70 while the red line stays below 30, this is an indicator that the stock could be poised for a strong Uptrend. For traders, this could mean going long the stock or exploring call options in the next month. Tickeron's A.I.dvisor backtested this indicator and found 196 similar cases, 169 of which were successful. Based on this data, the odds of success are 86%. Current price $29.57 is above $25.49 the highest resistance line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 02/04/21 - 03/09/21, the price experienced a +40% Uptrend. During the week of 03/02/21 - 03/09/21, the stock enjoyed a +2% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/kbwfqx56o8m61.png?width=1531&format=png&auto=webp&s=f21335de6fba1aa10f0ed14e896e9bb110585155

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on March 01, 2021. You may want to consider a long position or call options on PTGX as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 64 of 72 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 89%.

PTGX moved above its 50-day Moving Average on February 05, 2021 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for PTGX crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on February 10, 2021. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 15 of 15 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 90%.

Following a +3.02% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where PTGX advanced for three days, in 246 of 290 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 85%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 169 of 196 cases where PTGX Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 86%.

[Full information about signal here](https://tickeron.com/news/9781587-protagonist-therapeutics-s-ptgx-30-aroon-indicator-entered-an-uptrend-on-march-09-2021?utm_source=reddit&utm_medium=social&utm_campaign=test&utm_content=signal)

comments.body: Hell yeah I love these posts. I picked up a call option on ET today recommended by trailing trader only long bot. Currently sitting at a 60% day gain. Wooooo ai trading
